title: More than 250,000 DTE Energy in Michigan without power after storms
text: More than 250,000 customers of DTE Energy DTE, +0.21% are still without power on Tuesday morning, according to the outage map from Michigan's largest electric and gas company. The outages began after wind gusts reached 70 miles per hour on Monday night, DTE said.

title: DTE Energy donates $10 million to non-profits for energy assistance
text: The donation will assist elderly, unemployed, disabled and other Michigan residents in need The donation will assist elderly, unemployed, disabled and other Michigan residents in need

title: Ford Motor Company and DTE Energy announce the largest renewable energy purchase from a utility in U.S. history
text: Through its MIGreenPower program, DTE to add 650 megawatts of new solar energy in Michigan for Ford, increasing the total amount of installed solar in Michigan by nearly 70%

title: Ford locks in solar energy deal with DTE Energy
text: Ford said Wednesday it has reached a deal with DTE Energy to power its electricity supply in Michigan with clean energy, a step toward its goal to become carbon neutral by 2050.

title: Stocks This Week: Buy DTE Energy And Archer Daniels Midland
